title: elateriopsis oerstedii var. biolleyi
intro: Elateriopsis oerstedii var. biolleyi, also known as the Costa Rican bugbane, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Elateriopsis oerstedii var. biolleyi include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and roots in hot water, although more research is needed to fully confirm its uses and effects.
